rationale: The proposed change concerns Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts. Educ. Code §37.0052 governs student discipline for bullying behavior. The two provisions address unrelated subjects with no overlapping operative text.
quote: Sec. 37.0052. PLACEMENT OR EXPULSION OF STUDENTS WHO HAVE ENGAGED IN CERTAIN BULLYING BEHAVIOR.
_note: No relationship between proposed homestead exemption increase and this education discipline statute.
